body: This page will be provided by Deutscher Bühnenverein as commissioning party. Please complete with:

Responsible party (German § 5 TMG), address, authorised representatives, contact (phone/e-mail), trade registry (VAT-ID), party responsible for content (§ 18 (2) MStV), liability and copyright notices.
Status: placeholder – not approved for publication.
This page will be provided by Deutscher Bühnenverein as commissioning party. Please complete with:

Controller within the meaning of GDPR, data protection officer, contact, purposes and legal bases of processing, retention period, recipients, third-country transfers, data subject rights (Art. 15–22 GDPR), right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority.
Services used on this site: Vercel (hosting, USA – DPA required), Supabase (database/hosting, EU). No tracking tools in use.
Status: placeholder – not approved for publication.
